frameworks.label: Frameworks
frameworks.description: Choose one or more target frameworks to assess.

sources.label: Sources
sources.description: Restrict the assessment to specific connectors.

output.label: Output Format
output.description: Choose the report format to generate.

reportDir.label: Report Directory
reportDir.description: Optional output directory for the generated report bundle.

refresh.label: Refresh source findings
refresh.description: Force fresh collection from each selected source before assessment.

offline.label: Offline mode
offline.description: Use cached SCF data only and skip network access.
